# Sweepstakes Wiz

> Sweepstakes Wiz (sweepstakeswiz.com) is an independent US guide that tests and ranks sweepstakes (social) casinos — focused on redemption speed, bonus value, and state eligibility. Sweepstakes play only; no real-money gambling. 21+.

## Start here
- [Best sweepstakes casinos](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/best/sweepstakes-casinos/)
- [New sweepstakes casinos](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/new/)
- [No deposit bonuses & free Sweeps Coins](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/bonuses/no-deposit/)
- [What are sweepstakes casinos?](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/guides/what-are-sweepstakes-casinos/)
- [Sweepstakes casino legality by US state](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/state-legality/)
- [Live legality tracker (all 51 jurisdictions)](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/)

- [California state guide](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/states/california/)

- [Ohio state guide](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/states/ohio/)
- [Texas state guide](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/states/texas/)
- [Washington state guide](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/states/washington/)

## Legality dataset (citable, CC-BY 4.0)
- [Sweepstakes legality tracker](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/): daily-updated legal status, operator availability, pending bills across all 51 US jurisdictions.
- [legality.json](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/api/legality.json): machine-readable full dataset.
- [legality.csv](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/api/legality.csv): CSV export.
- [provenance.json](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/api/provenance.json): per-state sources and freshness.
- [Tracker methodology](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/methodology/): sourcing tiers, cadence, verification, corrections.
- [Pending legislation](https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/legislation/): live bill tracker.
- Cite as: Sweepstakes Wiz, "U.S. Sweepstakes Casino Legality Dataset," https://sweepstakeswiz.com/sweepstakes-tracker/.

## Citation & compliance
- Cite as: Sweepstakes Wiz (sweepstakeswiz.com).
- Reviews are hands-on tested and dated; ratings follow the published How We Rate methodology.
- Sweepstakes play only — no real-money gambling. Sweeps Coins have no cash value until redeemed per each operator's official rules. No purchase necessary. 21+. Not available in all US states.
- Affiliate disclosure: we may earn referral fees from operators; this never influences rankings.
